title: EXTRASTAR LED Strip Light 5M 300 LEDs, Cuttable Multiple RGB Light Strip Music Sync with App and Remote Control, IP44 TV Backlight with Timer, Work with Google Home and Alexa
features: SMART CONTROL: Dual control options with smartphone app and infrared remote control for convenient colour changing, brightness adjustment, and timing settings. No hub required, the tv led lights works with 2.4G WIFI networks.
CUSTOMISABLE LENGTH: 5 metre LED strip light that can be cut to every 6 Leds/10cm at marked intervals, the 12v led strip is perfect for custom installations around TVs, furniture, or room perimeters

VERSATILE INSTALLATION: Easy 3D mounting thanks to electrical tape. Self-adhesive backing allows for easy peel-and-stick mounting on most clean, flat surfaces, with additional mounting clips included for secure placement.
LIGHTING MODES: Multiple RGB colour options with music sync capability, creating dynamic lighting effects that respond to sound for enhanced ambiance. Support Google Home and Alexa
SCHEDULING FEATURES: Built-in timer and scheduling functions via app control, allowing automated operation for personalised lighting routines.
description: Transform your living space with the EXTRASTAR Smart LED Strip Light, a versatile 5-metre lighting solution that brings vibrant colours and ambiance to any room. This innovative LED strip features music synchronisation capability, allowing the lights to dance to your favourite tunes. The dual control system offers convenient management through both a smartphone app and infrared remote control, giving you complete command over colours, brightness, and lighting effects. The tv led backlights strip is easily customisable - cut it to your desired length and install it anywhere with its peel-and-stick backing. Perfect for TV backlighting, bedroom decoration, or creating atmospheric lighting in your living room. The strip includes practical features like scheduling and timer functions, letting you automate your lighting experience. With IP44 protection and 12V operation, this LED strip provides reliable and safe illumination. The package includes reinforcing accessories for enhanced stability during installation. Whether you're creating a home theatre ambiance or adding accent lighting, this smart LED strip delivers impressive versatility and convenience in one package.

specifications_table.Included Components: ‎Led Strip Light, Mounting Clips, Power Adapter, Remote Control
specifications_table.Special features: ‎App Control, Cuttable, Music Sync, Remote Controlled, Waterproof
